rules.description: A Model with this Special Rule can join Units with the Malefic Sub-Type as if it had that Sub-Type and while part of such a Unit, is treated as having that Sub-Type
rules.name: The Power of the Word

rules.description:
If a Model with this Special Rule is part of an Army, then the Controlling Player may apply the following additional Special Rules to all Auxiliary, Apex and Primary Detachments that have the same Faction Trait as the Model with this Special Rule:


- If four or more Troops Battlefield Role Slots in the Primary Detachment of this Army are filled with Despoiler Squad Units and/or Tactical Squad Units, then all Force Organisation Slots with Troops Battlefield Role in the Primary Detachment are considered Prime Slots.


Furthermore, if a Model with this Special Rule is part of an Army, then the following Special Rules are granted to all Models with the Word Bearers Trait in the same Army:


- Until the end of the first Battle Turn of the Battle, each time the Controlling Player of a Model with this Special Rule is required to make a Leadership Check for a Unit that includes only Models with the Word Bearers Trait, that Leadership Check is automatically passed.
rules.name: Sire of the Word Bearers

rules.description:
"Kor Phaeron's Controlling Player may apply additional Special Rules to friendly Units in the Effects Sub-Phase."


In this Model's Controlling Player's Effects Sub-Phase, this Model's Controlling Player can select one friendly Unit which only includes Models with the Word Bearers Trait within 6" of this Model, then select one of the following effects.


- Cruel Invective: Until the start of the Controlling Player's next Effects Sub-Phase, all Models in the selected Unit gain the Hatred (Loyalist) Special Rule.
- Threatening Entreaties: Until the start of the Controlling Player's next Effects Sub-Phase, modify the Leadership and Cool Characteristics of all Models in the selected Unit by +2.
rules.name: Dark Oratory

rules.description:
"Kor Phaeron's Characteristics increase if he is the only Unique Model in the Army.


If this Model is the only Model with the Unique Sub-Type in your Army, modify this Model's Wounds and Leadership Characteristics by +1.
rules.name: Jealous Command

rules.description: A Model with this Special Rule can join Units with the Malefic Sub-Type as if it had that Sub-Type and while part of such a Unit, is treated as having that Sub-Type.
rules.name: Lord of the Blessed

rules.description: An Army whose Primary Detachment includes a Model with this Special Rule may select Demonic Manifestation Auxiliary Detachments regardless of how many Command Force Organisation Slots are filled with Esoterist Units.
rules.name: Harbinger of Chaos

characteristics.$text: The Active Player may choose to Manifest the Soul Binding Psychic Power in the Assault Phase, at the start of the Declare Weapons and Set Initiative Steps Step of the Fight Sub-Phase
characteristics.name: Trigger

characteristics.$text: The Focus of the Power must be a Zardu Layak Model.
characteristics.name: Focus

characteristics.$text: The Target Unit must be an enemy Unit in the same Combat as the Focus Model.
characteristics.name: Target

characteristics.$text: If successfully Manifested, the effects of this Psychic Power last until the end of the Make Final Pile-in Moves Step of that Combat.
characteristics.name: Duration

characteristics.$text:
1. Once the Focus and Target Unit have been decided, the Target Unit’s Controlling Player makes a Resistance Check for that Unit.
2. If the Resistance Check is failed, the Controlling Player of the Focus Model can select one Model with a Willpower Characteristic of 7 or less from the Target Unit.
3. For the Duration of this Psychic Power, the selected Model is considered to be under the control of the Controlling Player of the Focus of this Power.
4. If the Resistance Check succeeds then there is no further effect.
characteristics.name: Process

rules.description:
"Zardu Layak has specific Psychic Powers."


A Model with this Special Rule gains the Soul Binding Psychic Power and the Breach the Veil Psychic Power.
rules.name: Binder of Souls

rules.description: When resolving a Combat in the Resolution Sub-Phase of the Assault Phase, score 1 Combat Resolution point for the Unit that includes a Model with the Panoply of Flame.
rules.name: The Panoply of Flame

rules.description:
"Ashen Circle improves the Firepower Characteristic of Akkadic hand flamers in the Volley Step."


When a Model with this Special Rule makes Volley Attacks, modify the Firepower Characteristic of that Model's Akkadic hand flamer by +1.
rules.name: Harbingers of Truth

rules.description:
"A Unit containing any Models with this Special Rule gains the Malefic Sub-Type and the Feel No Pain (6+) Special Rule once it scores Victory Points due to the Vanguard (X) Special Rule, after suffering D3 wounds."




A Unit containing Models with this Special Rule may never be joined by a Model without this Special Rule. Additionally, the first time in a Battle each Unit which includes Models with this Special Rule scores Victory Points due to the Vanguard (X) Special Rule, that Unit immediately suffers D3 automatic wounds with an AP of 2 and a Damage of 1 against which no Saving Throws of any kind may be made. Once these wounds are resolved, every Model in that Unit immediately gains the Malefic Sub-Type and the Feel No Pain (6+) Special Rule for the remainder of the Battle.
rules.name: Empty Vessels

Twin heavy disintegrator and one Saturnine disruption fist
Saturnine war axe and one Saturnine disruption fist

characteristics.$text: Warpfire mantles grant Models the chance to inflict wounds against nearby Units when they are hit by Shooting Attacks.
characteristics.name: Summary

characteristics.$text: At the end of the Attacks Sub-Phase of any Shooting Phase, if a Unit contains any Models with warpfire mantles which passed at least one Armour or Invulnerable Test against wounds caused by Shooting Attacks in that Shooting Phase, every Unit with at least one Model within 8" of at least one Model in that Unit must make a Toughness Check, unless it contains any Models with a warpfire mantle. A Unit which fails this Toughness Check suffers D3 automatic wounds with a Damage Characteristic of 1 and an AP of 2 against which no Saving Throws of any kind can be made, allocated as if they were inflicted by a Shooting Attack.
characteristics.name: Description

sharedRules.description:
"Word Bearers gain additional Combat Resolution Points."


When resolving a Combat in the Resolution Sub-Phase of the Assault Phase, score 1 Combat Resolution point if any friendly Models in that Combat have the Word Bearers Trait.
sharedRules.name: Unwavering Conviction

sharedRules.description:
"A Model with this Special Rule can join Units that have the Malefic Sub-Type."
A Model with this Special Rule can join Units with the Malefic Sub-Type as if it had that Sub-Type and while part of such a Unit, is treated as having that Sub-Type.
sharedRules.name: Damned

sharedRules.description:
A Model with this Special Rule can gain Flesh Harvest Points. A Model with this Special Rule gains 1 Flesh Harvest point each time a Unit that includes that Model is selected to Consolidate, if any enemy Models in that Combat had the Infantry or Cavalry Type. If a Model with the Paragon Type was Removed as a Casualty during that Combat, the Model with this Special Rule gains 2 Flesh Harvest Points instead.


If a Model with any Flesh Harvest Points is Removed as a Casualty, any Flesh Harvest Points that Model has are lost. During the Decide Victor Step, at the end of the Battle, the Controlling Player of any Models with the Flesh Harvester Special Rule scores a number of Victory Points equal to the number of Flesh Harvest Points that any one of those Models, selected by the Controlling Player, currently has.
sharedRules.name: Flesh Harvester

characteristics.$text: This Gambit allows the Controlling Player to make a Willpower Check to modify their Characteristics.
characteristics.name: Summary

characteristics.$text: This Gambit can only be selected during the first face Off Step of a Challenge involving this Model. If this Gambit is selected, then the Controlling Player immediately makes a Willpower Check for this Model. If the Check is passed, until the end of this Challenge Sub-Phase, this Model adds +1 to its Strength and Attacks Characteristics. If the Check is failed, this Model suffers 1 Wound with an AP Characteristic of 2 and a Damage Characteristic of 1. No Saves or Damage Mitigation Roll may be made to discard this wound.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This Reaction allows the Controlling Player to allocate all wounds caused by a Fire Group to a single Model of their choosing.
characteristics.name: Summary

characteristics.$text: Once per Battle, the Reactive Player may declare the Glorious Martyrdom Advanced Reaction in the Shooting Phase, during Step 5 of the Shooting Attack sequence of any Shooting Attack made by the Active Player that targets a Unit that includes only Models wit the Word Bearers Trait.
characteristics.name: Trigger

characteristics.$text: The Reactive Player must spend 1 point of their Reaction Allotment to declare a Glorious Martyrdom Advanced Reaction, this cost paid as soon as the declaration is made.
characteristics.name: Cost

characteristics.$text: For the Glorious Martyrdom Advanced Reaction, the Reacting Unit is always the Unit that was the target of the Shooting Attack that triggered the Reaction.
characteristics.name: Target

characteristics.$text: In Step 5 of the Shooting Attack sequence, the Reactive Player must select one Model from the Reacting Unit. Until the current Fire Group and any Fire Groups that split form it have been resolved, only the selected Model can be selected as the Target Model. If that Model is removed as a Casualty, the remainder of that Fire Group and any additional Fire Groups that have been created from it are discarded and the Active Player moves to Step 10 of that Shooting Attack.
characteristics.name: Process
